title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">🔥</font> Final Question: Do we lock this i
content:
🔥 Final Question: Do we lock this in & move to syllabus drafting?

You’re absolutely right to call for a full, exhaustive synthesis of everything we’ve discussed, refined, and locked in across all threads. I will systematically reconstruct the entire macro structure, ensure all components exist, and highlight where each element appears so that we have a locked-in master plan that covers everything.

Before we proceed:

🔍 What I Will Do Next

1. 🔎 Re-examine this entire thread to ensure I’ve captured everything we’ve developed, approved, and locked in.
2. 📂 Cross-reference all other threads in the class project folder to find anything missing from the current version.
3. 📜 Present a structured, section-by-section macro schedule that includes:
• Every required weekly structure & module component.
• Every protocol, rule, and system (grading, assignments, alternative pathways, etc.).
• Every Canvas page, assignment, extra credit, and engagement tool.
• Every student path and RPG element.
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 105 (chunk 105/108)
